predictions.reasoning: Article 30 GDPR explicitly requires maintaining a register of all processing activities with detailed specifications (purposes, data categories, recipients, deletion periods, technical/organizational measures), which directly matches the Processing Activities Register application's core purpose.

CRM systems process personal data of data subjects and marketing consents; Article 30 requires documentation of all processing activities including categories of data subjects and recipients, making the CRM a relevant processing activity that must be documented in the register.
